title: Editing at Expert Level
description: Line editing vs structural editing: what to cut, what to expand, when to stop.
summary_pt_br: Edição: estrutural, de linha, copy desk. Sempre nessa ordem.

scenes.subtitle_en: Line editing vs structural editing: what to cut, what to expand, when to stop.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Edição: estrutural, de linha, copy desk. Sempre nessa ordem.

scenes.text_en: Line editing vs structural editing: what to cut, what to expand, when to stop. Focus: editing at expert level. Structural editing comes before line editing.
scenes.text_pt: Edição: estrutural, de linha, copy desk. Sempre nessa ordem. Foco: editing at expert level. Edição estrutural vem antes da de linha.

scenes.title: Editing at Expert Level
scenes.body_en: STRUCTURAL: order, pacing, argument shape. LINE: word-by-word, rhythm, clarity. COPY: grammar, punctuation. Edit in that order. Never all at once.
scenes.body_pt: Edição: estrutural, de linha, copy desk. Sempre nessa ordem.

examples.en: Structural editing comes before line editing.
examples.pt: Edição estrutural vem antes da de linha.

examples.en: Cut any sentence that would survive without you.
examples.pt: Corte toda frase que sobreviveria sem você.

examples.en: Knowing when to stop editing is half the job.
examples.pt: Saber quando parar é metade do trabalho.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Editing at Expert Level

exercise.question: Complete: "___ editing comes before line editing."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Structural editing comes before line editing."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Edição estrutural vem antes da de linha.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Cut any sentence that would survive without you.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Cut any sentence that would survive without you."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Corte toda frase que sobreviveria sem você.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Editing at Expert Level — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre editing at expert level. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, what's the first editing pass?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Cut any sentence that survives without you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: When the next edit would only change preference.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Editing is the writer's deepest act of respect for the reader.

scenes.title: The editor's desk
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the three editing passes. Use at least three editing terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At Saturday's editing workshop, Kumar passed around a short essay that had been through his red pen four times.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Structural editing comes first — we change the order of paragraphs before we touch a single word in them.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Then line editing is word by word, looking at rhythm and clarity sentence by sentence, paragraph by paragraph.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Copy-editing is last — grammar, punctuation, spelling. Never do copy work during structural or line passes.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: Your advice to cut any sentence that survives without you — that cut eighty words from my first draft alone.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Editing, Kumar insisted, is how writers prove to readers they have taken reading as seriously as writing itself.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Editing at Expert Level". Line editing vs structural editing: what to cut, what to expand, when to stop. Structural editing comes before line editing. Cut any sentence that would survive without you. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Editing at Expert Level". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Editing at Expert Level".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Editing at Expert Level".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
